projectDescription: A browser-based operating system built with React 19, TypeScript, WebAssembly, and Three.js that simulates a full desktop environment with 20+ integrated applications, virtual file system, window management, and neon themes.
keyFeatures: Full desktop environment in the browser with drag-and-drop windows, snap layouts, and virtual desktops
20+ built-in applications including File Explorer, Terminal, Task Manager, Browser, Notepad, Paint, and VS Code clone
NEX Runtime engine with simulated npm/pnpm package management and .nex executable support
WASM performance layer using AssemblyScript and Rust for CPU-intensive calculations (100x faster than JS)
Dynamic neon themes: Cyberpunk, Matrix, and Synthwave with Three.js 3D backgrounds
Virtual File System (VFS) in-memory with full CRUD operations and recursive folder support
Full OS lifecycle: UEFI → POST → Boot → Login → Desktop → Shutdown/Restart
PWA-ready with offline support and installable as a native app via vite-plugin-pwa
publicApiSurface: useWindowManager() — openWindow, closeWindow, minimizeWindow, maximizeWindow, restoreWindow, snapWindow, focusWindow
useSettings() — theme, neonTheme, wallpaper, accentColor, brightness, volume, toggleTheme, setNeonTheme, addNotification
useDesktop() — addDesktopIcon, updateDesktopIcon, removeDesktopIcon, sortDesktopIcons, switchDesktop, addDesktop
useUI() — isStartOpen, toggleStart, isWidgetsOpen, toggleWidgets, isDesktopSwitcherOpen
APPS registry in src/constants/apps.tsx — id, icon, label, component
AppWindow interface — id, title, icon, content, desktopId, isOpen, isMinimized, isMaximized, snap, zIndex, savedSize
SystemState type — OFF | BOOTING | UEFI | WINDOWS_BOOT | LOGIN | DESKTOP | SHUTTING_DOWN | RESTARTING
assembly/index.ts WASM exports — calculateSystemLoad, processMetrics, analyzePerformance
